Controller Of Examination Dr. Neel Kanth +91-01792 -239252(O) neelkanth@juitsolan.in Brief Life Sketch of  Dr. Neel Kanth Controller of Examinations Jaypee University of Information Technology,Waknaghat. Distt. Solan (H.P)
                                Pin:173 215 Dr. Neel Kanth is serving as Controller of Examination and Chief Warden of the
university. He is also working as coordinator for BCA programme. He has a passion
for teaching Mathematics and loves interacting with students. He had also worked
as Dy.Controller of Examination and Dy.Chief warden of the university for more
than 6 years. Dr. Neel Kanth has done his M.Sc in Industrial Mathematics and Informatics and
Ph.D in the area of Mathematical Modelling and Simulation from I.I.T Roorkee.
He joined Jaypee University of Information Technology, Solan in 2010 as Assistant
Professor and is currently working as Associate Professor in department of
Mathematics of the university. He is involved in teaching Mathematics courses to
the graduate and post graduate students of the university. Dr. Neel Kanth research interest includes Mathematical Modelling and Simulation
of contact problems having applications in process industries. He is an active
researcher with multiple articles and book chapters in International journals and
books. Currently he is guiding three Ph.D scholars and one scholar had already
completed Ph.D under his guidance. Dr. Amardeep Member of Examination Committee +91 01792 – 239514 amardeep@juit.ac.in Assistant Professor (Sr. Grade), Department of Civil Engineering, JUIT, Waknaghat Dr. Harsh Sohal Member of Examination Committee +91 01792 – 239247 harsh.sohal@juit.ac.in Associate Professor, Department of ECE, JUIT, Waknaghat Tandrabati Biswal Jr. Coordinator +91 01792 – 239331 tandrabati.biswal@juit.ac.in Ashok Kishtwal Sr. Lab Engineer +91 01792 – 239217 ashok.kistwal@juit.ac.in Baleshwar Prasad Lab Engineer +91 01792 – 239219 baleshwar.shukla@juit.ac.in Ravi Raina Lab Technician +91 01792 – 239298 ravi.raina@juit.ac.in Associate Dean (Innovation) Prof. (Dr.) Tiratha Raj Singh +91-01792-239344 Brief Life Sketch of Professor Tiratha Raj Singh Dr. Tiratha Raj Singh is a senior academician, researcher, and administrator at Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT), Waknaghat, currently serving as Associate Dean (Innovation). He is a Professor in the Department of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics, and also holds the responsibilities of Media In-charge and Coordinator of the Centre of Healthcare Technologies and Informatics (CEHTI). He earned his PhD in Bioinformatics from MANIT, Bhopal, with joint doctoral research at Tel Aviv University, Israel, followed by a prestigious VATAT postdoctoral fellowship in Functional Genomics and Molecular Evolution at TAU. Since joining JUIT in 2010, his research has focused on genomics, proteomics, systems biology, and AI-driven computational approaches to decode complex biological networks underlying DNA repair mechanisms, Alzheimer’s disease, and cancer. His lab actively mines large-scale genomic, transcriptomic, proteomic, and pathway datasets to identify disease mechanisms, propose novel therapeutic inhibitors, and develop biological databases, analytical tools, and web-based applications. Dr. Singh has led and contributed to several DST, ICMR, and DBT-funded projects, published extensively in leading international journals, supervised numerous undergraduate and postgraduate research projects, and guided eight PhD scholars to completion. His contributions have been recognized through international awards, an international patent, and prestigious research distinctions, reflecting his commitment to innovation-driven research, academic leadership, and translational impact. Chief Warden Dr. Neel Kanth +91-01792 -239252(O) neelkanth@juitsolan.in Brief Life Sketch of Dr. Neel Kanth Associate Professor, Department of Mathematics, JUIT Waknaghat Dr. Neel Kanth is serving as Chief Warden and Controller of Examination of the university. He is also working as coordinator for BCA programme. He has a passion for teaching Mathematics and loves interacting with students. He had also worked as warden and Dy.chief warden of the university for more than 9 years. Dr. Neel Kanth has done his M.Sc in Industrial Mathematics and Informatics and Ph.D in the area of Mathematical Modelling and Simulation from I.I.T Roorkee. He joined Jaypee University of Information Technology, Solan in 2010 as Assistant Professor and is currently working as Associate Professor in department of Mathematics of the university. He is involved in teaching Mathematics courses to the graduate and post graduate students of the university. Dr. Neel Kanth research interest includes Mathematical Modelling and Simulation of contact problems having applications in process industries. He is an active researcher with multiple articles and book chapters in International journals and books. Currently he is guiding one Ph.D scholar and one scholar had already completed Ph.D under his guidance.
